note: Residual findings from a fresh /audit full run on main after PR #37/#38. These are the structural items the earlier round did not address (resolve-vault.sh never decomposed — still 848 lines) plus newly-surfaced security findings (firewall.sh strict mode + JSON escaping). Pattern opportunities from the audit's Recommended Actions are FOLDED into their co-located risk finding as the corrective approach (gateway→vendor-lock-in on git.ts; builder→primitive-obsession on cli.ts; circuit-breaker→busy-waiting on ollama-chat.sh; template-method→duplicated _json_escape on the bash gates). lane ∈ {A,B,C,D}. Files are partitioned so no two lanes touch the same file. intentionalDesign=true findings get an architect fix-or-document ruling first; for the gateway the user explicitly requested implementation via the Recommended Actions, so it is intentionalDesign=false.

lanes.B: wiki-dev-eng-schema — scripts/firewall.sh, scripts/validate-frontmatter.sh, scripts/resolve-vault.sh, scripts/lib-validate-gate.sh (new), src/data/config/config.ts, scripts/lib-page-type.sh, tests/scripts/resolve-vault.bats
lanes.C: wiki-dev-eng-ingest — src/core/git.ts, src/core/vault-lock.ts, scripts/snapshot.sh, scripts/ollama-chat.sh, scripts/verify-ingest.sh, scripts/eval-ingest-extract.sh, src/commands/route/route.ts, scripts/protect-raw.sh, src/core/manifest.test.ts
lanes.D: wiki-dev-eng-ux — scripts/validate-docs.sh, scripts/heartbeat.sh, agents/claude-wiki-pages-analyst-agent.md, scripts/graph-quality.sh, scripts/distribute-wiki.sh, scripts/enforce-dmi.sh, scripts/enforce-must-rule.sh, tests/scripts/run-tests.bats, tests/scripts/heartbeat.bats, tests/engine/capabilities-contract.test.ts, src/commands/verify/verify.test.ts

findings.summary: The write-confinement gate (runs on every Write/Edit) lacks `set -euo pipefail`; an unset $VAULT_ABS on the hook path silently expands to empty. Add strict mode with explicit fallbacks for the documented resilience cases the comments cite.

Block-decision JSON built with `sed` escaping that covers `"` but not backslash/newline/control chars; FILE_PATH is externally controlled. Replace sed/printf JSON construction with `jq -n --arg` (the safe idiom already used in ollama-chat.sh). Keep gate-11 firewall-parity with src/core/firewall.ts.
Block reason echoes the absolute vault path including the username. Redact or relativize the path in the user-facing reason.
Symlink loop guard `40` is an uncommented magic number. Name a constant with a one-line rationale.
Block-decision JSON escape misses tab/CR/C0 control chars. Switch to `jq -n --arg`. Same fix family as B02.

848-line sourced helper owning four concerns (vault resolution, settings I/O, multi-vault registry CRUD, wired-source CRUD); 13+ public functions; sourced by every hook → single change bottleneck. Extract by concern into focused sourceable libs, mirroring the lib-page-type.sh precedent. Keep every public function name/behavior stable (hooks source it).
`vault_cross_log()` is ~84 lines with 4+ levels of nesting. Flatten with early returns / extracted helpers as part of the B06 decomposition.

The block-decision JSON-escape helper is byte-identical across the bash gates. After B02/B05 convert firewall.sh and validate-frontmatter.sh to jq, extract the shared gate skeleton (`_json_escape` / emit-block-decision) into a new sourced `scripts/lib-validate-gate.sh` and have firewall.sh + validate-frontmatter.sh source it. Scope to these two Lane-B sinks only; adoption in check-wikilinks.sh / verify-ingest.sh is a deferred follow-up to avoid cross-lane file contention.
`APPROVED_LOCAL_MODELS` back-compat alias has no importers. Remove it.
Config is a passive bag; decisions live in free functions. Deliberate functional style — architect to rule fix vs document.
Shared page-type helper has no Bats coverage. Add tests/scripts/lib-page-type.bats (TDD).

`assert_output_contains "vault"` is near-always true. Tighten to assert the exact resolved path/tier. Routed to Lane B because B06's decomposition already edits this bats file (avoids cross-lane contention).

On lock-acquire timeout the bash fallback runs `git add`/`commit`/log-append OUTSIDE the lock; two concurrent invocations can interleave. Fail closed (or queue) on timeout instead of falling through to unguarded git ops. Coordinate with C02 as ONE coherent advisory-lock fix.

Re-entrant `acquireVaultLockSync` on a held vault silently returns a no-op release (queue never drained in the sync path). Make re-entrancy explicit (reject, or true re-entrant counting). Latent today (no re-entrant caller) but unsafe.

Core shells out to the git CLI directly via execFileSync with no gateway/port. The user's Recommended Actions explicitly request `/implement-patterns gateway` here. Introduce a GitProvider/gateway port isolating git from core; migrate call sites; add a timeout to every git execFileSync. Was previously documented-as-intentional — now scoped to implement.
`stashUserChanges`/`stashPop` are referenced only by tests. As part of C03, either wire them into the heal/snapshot path or delete them (and their tests).
Sourceable helper lacks `set -euo pipefail`. Add strict mode (guard the source-vs-exec distinction).

Retry loop has no inter-attempt sleep; exponential doubling applies only to curl --max-time, not to a backoff sleep. Add a real backoff sleep between attempts; formalize the open/half-open reachability state (the circuit-breaker fit) so repeated probes short-circuit.
No Bats coverage. Add tests/scripts/ollama-chat.bats covering the retry/backoff and source-vs-exec paths (mock curl).
Title-extract one-liner duplicated ×6. DRY into one local helper. Keep gate-05 verify-parity with src/commands/verify.
Tombstone comment + extraction for an unwired §12 check that is never consumed. Remove the dead extraction. Watch gate-05.
`fm_scalar` ≈ `_fm_field` — two near-identical frontmatter scalar extractors. Consolidate to one.
4+ leaf reads of Config. Pass a focused, already-resolved decision input instead of reaching into Config repeatedly.
`config.maintenance as Record` cast bypasses the type. Add a typed accessor / narrow properly instead of casting.

TOCTOU window in the agent-session new-file carve-out; the hook does not hold the vault lock across check→write. Architect to rule: close with a lock or document the residual window in SECURITY.md. Sanctioned carve-out — do not weaken raw immutability.
No invalid-path / permission-error negative tests. Add them (TDD).

`ParsedArgs` is a 17-field primitive bag. The user's Recommended Actions request `/implement-patterns builder` here. Introduce a Builder + typed value-objects (e.g. OllamaStatus/ClaudeStatus/RouteSub for the constrained strings) to tame assembly and constrain the string fields.

Hand-rolled Porter stemmer. Justified by the zero-dependency NO-RAG design (§5 non-negotiable forbids reaching for a similarity/NLP dependency). Architect to rule — almost certainly DOCUMENT (add a header comment + ADR pointer), not replace.
No invalid-path / permission-error negative tests. Add them (TDD).

`_scan_design_file()` is ~90 lines with 3 side-effects and 4 nesting levels. Flatten with early returns / helpers. This script IS the glossary gate — keep behavior byte-identical (validate-docs must still pass on the same inputs).
Runtime-emitted literal "TODO" string in the gate output. Remove the stale placeholder. Keep gate behavior identical.
No strict mode; runs on SessionStart. Add `set -euo pipefail` with explicit fallbacks for the resilience path.
The read-only "analyst" agent is granted Write+Edit. Drop to read-only tools (Read/Grep/Glob/Bash) for least-privilege. Verify nothing in the analyst flow actually writes.
No Bats coverage on the graph-quality detector. Add tests/scripts/graph-quality.bats (TDD).
No Bats coverage. Add tests/scripts/distribute-wiki.bats.
enforce-dmi.sh and enforce-must-rule.sh have no Bats coverage. Add focused tests for each.
`sleep 0.05` mtime-ordering test fails on 1s-granularity filesystems. Replace with a deterministic touch sequence (explicit timestamps).
Makes real git commits; depends on gpgsign config. Isolate with a scratch repo + commit.gpgsign=false.

Hardcoded verb list (and verify.test.ts:73 exact counts/check-names) couple tests to implementation detail. Assert the contract (membership/shape) rather than an exact frozen list. Also covers src/commands/verify/verify.test.ts:73.
